prompt: Create a hyper-detailed vertical fantasy fashion portrait of an ethereal young woman centered against a deep black studio background. She has porcelain skin, large pale blue eyes, soft glossy lips, and a calm, doll-like expression, looking directly at the viewer. Her short airy bob haircut is split into vivid pastel colors: cyan blue, cotton-candy pink, and pale lavender, with wispy strands floating outward. She wears an elaborate floral-and-wing headpiece with exactly 7 prominent large blossoms: 3 large white dahlia-like flowers across the top and left side, 2 pink roses on the right side, and 2 smaller white flowers near the lower left edge, plus delicate baby’s-breath-like sprigs, thorny black twigs, curled tendrils, and two translucent pale gray butterfly or fairy wings rising behind her head. Her outfit is a dramatic haute-couture black lace corset dress with a deep sweetheart neckline, sheer sleeves, a black lace choker collar, white petal appliqués, silver vein-like embroidery, and organic branch filigree spreading over her shoulders and chest. Surround her with exactly 5 prominent floating white flower accents around the frame: one near the upper left, one mid-left, one lower left, one near her right shoulder, and one near the lower right, mixed with fine black splatter-like botanical lines and drifting translucent petals. Use ultra-realistic anime-inspired fantasy photography, sharp facial detail, luminous skin, intricate lace texture, high contrast, soft directional light, shallow depth of field, and a surreal gothic fairy aesthetic. Vertical 9:16 composition, upper-body framing from head to waist, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a hyper-detailed vertical fantasy fashion portrait of an ethereal young woman centered against a deep black studio background. She has porcelain skin, large pale blue eyes, soft glossy lips, and a calm, doll-like expression, looking directly at the viewer. Her short airy bob haircut is split into vivid pastel colors: cyan blue, cotton-candy pink, and pale lavender, with wispy strands floating outward. She wears an elaborate floral-and-wing headpiece with exactly 7 prominent large blossoms: 3 large white dahlia-like flowers across the top and left side, 2 pink roses on the right side, and 2 smaller white flowers near the lower left edge, plus delicate baby’s-breath-like sprigs, thorny black twigs, curled tendrils, and two translucent pale gray butterfly or fairy wings rising behind her head. Her outfit is a dramatic haute-couture black lace corset dress with a deep sweetheart neckline, sheer sleeves, a black lace choker collar, white petal appliqués, silver vein-like embroidery, and organic branch filigree spreading over her shoulders and chest. Surround her with exactly 5 prominent floating white flower accents around the frame: one near the upper left, one mid-left, one lower left, one near her right shoulder, and one near the lower right, mixed with fine black splatter-like botanical lines and drifting translucent petals. Use ultra-realistic anime-inspired fantasy photography, sharp facial detail, luminous skin, intricate lace texture, high contrast, soft directional light, shallow depth of field, and a surreal gothic fairy aesthetic. Vertical 9:16 composition, upper-body framing from head to waist, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张超精细的竖版奇幻时尚肖像，主角 一位空灵的年轻女性 居中，背景为深邃的黑色摄影棚背景。她拥有瓷器般的肌肤、明亮的大眼睛、柔软光泽的嘴唇，表情平静如玩偶，直视镜头。她留着轻盈的短波波头，发色呈现鲜艳的粉彩色：青蓝色、棉花糖粉色和淡紫色，发丝轻盈飘逸。她佩戴着精致的花卉与翅膀头饰，包含 7 朵醒目的大花：顶部和左侧有 3 朵巨大的白色大丽花，右侧有 2 朵粉色玫瑰，左下边缘附近有 2 朵较小的白花，并点缀着精致的满天星、带刺的黑色细枝、卷曲的藤蔓，以及她脑后升起的两片半透明浅灰色蝴蝶或精灵翅膀。她的装束是一件极具戏剧性的高级定制黑色蕾丝束腰连衣裙，采用深心形领口、透视袖子、黑色蕾丝颈圈，饰有白色花瓣贴花、银色脉络刺绣，以及蔓延至肩部和胸前的有机树枝花丝。在画面周围布置 5 朵醒目的漂浮白色花朵装饰：左上方、左中部、左下方、右肩附近及右下方各一朵，并混合细微的黑色喷溅状植物线条和飘落的半透明花瓣。采用 超写实动漫风格奇幻摄影，面部细节锐利，肌肤光泽感强，蕾丝纹理复杂，高对比度，柔和的定向光，浅景深，呈现超现实的哥特精灵美学。竖版 9:16 构图，半身像（从头部到腰部），无文字，无水印。
